title: First Heartbeat
_artist_statement: An SVG depicting the Bond Pulse: two overlapping bodies (global = offspring repos, local = ~/.brainstem/) with a heartbeat waveform peaking inside their overlap — where the pulse reconciles them. Seven labeled nodes around the perimeter mark the bond.json event kinds (birth/bond/adoption/hatch/graft/launch/rhythm) — every event the organism remembers. The piece is generated entirely from deterministic SVG primitives — no images, no fonts beyond Georgia serif. CC0 so any other neighborhood can remix, including by remixing the data the diagram encodes.
